epigraph.quote: It was bloody cold but lovely to see the family.

moments.quote: It was bloody cold but lovely to see the family.
the owner strolled down to meet us in the dark. He was a campervan enthusiast.
we chatted for about half an hour on her font porch.
It was lovely to have a meal with friends.
We then thought it may be possible to call on Conta the next day so picked a campsite SE of Swindon at a small farm that kept a special herd of sheep.

Simon had already located a scrap car firm that happened to have an old Renault Master Mk 1 that may have had an instrument panel that could be used to replace the defective one in our old van. This yard was in Witney so we drove there
we thought it would be nice to have a pub lunch and we found a good one at Finstock (the Plough).
owned by a seemingly eccentric woman who gave instructions over the phone.
